message.content:
@startuml
title Manage-Pipeline

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #333333
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor #333333
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #333333
  BoxBackgroundColor #BFE3EE
  ArrowColor #111111
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "actorName" as A

box "Manage-Pipeline" #BFE3EE
participant "CLI" as CLI
participant "Web" as WEB
participant "caade" as CAADE
end box

A -> CLI : caade-pipeline-destroy()
CLI -> CAADE : pipeline/destroy()
A -> WEB : pipeline/destroy()
WEB -> CAADE : pipeline/destroy()

@enduml
